author: D23 RSS
text:
How Sofia the First: Royal Magic Is Enchanting a Whole New Generation on Disney Jr. and Disney+

Sofia the First: Royal Magic, a brand-new series set in the world of Sofia the First, will premiere Monday, May 25, on Disney Jr. at 7 a.m. ET/PT and Disney Jr. on Demand, with the first eight episodes available to stream on Disney+ in the U.S. and select international markets the next day, Tuesday, May 26.

The post How <em>Sofia the First: Royal Magic</em> Is Enchanting a Whole New Generation on Disney Jr. and Disney+ appeared first on D23.
